meta_title: For Students: SaaS pricing to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Pricing Strategy for Students: Beat Marketing Gaps
content.seo_description: Master SaaS pricing to bypass marketing hurdles. A beginner-friendly guide for students to launch profitable apps using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to succeed; you need a pricing model that sells itself. By implementing value-based pricing and a transparent tier structure, your product converts users automatically. Use Antigravity to architect your billing logic and Claude Code to deploy robust, high-conversion payment flows instantly.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks architecting the perfect codebase, but the silence from your landing page is deafening. The 'build it and they will come' myth is the graveyard of student projects. Without a marketing budget, your software needs to do the heavy lifting—specifically, your pricing strategy needs to act as your primary acquisition engine.

Stop viewing pricing as a spreadsheet task and start viewing it as a psychological lever. By aligning your pricing tiers with specific user outcomes rather than arbitrary feature lists, you turn your SaaS into a self-qualifying funnel. Let’s transform your project from a 'cool side project' into a commercial asset using modern AI-assisted engineering.

steps.title: Define Your Value-Based Tiers
steps.description: Identify the core pain point your app solves and map it to three distinct pricing tiers: Starter, Professional, and Enterprise.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a JSON schema for a SaaS pricing model with three tiers. Focus on value-based metrics (e.g., usage volume) rather than just feature lists.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a pricing-model.json with 3 tiers based on user-value metrics'

steps.title: Architect the Billing Logic
steps.description: Use Antigravity to structure your backend logic for subscription management and usage tracking.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a TypeScript interface for a subscription service that integrates with Stripe, handling tier upgrades and usage-based limits.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create billing-service.ts with stripe integration logic'

steps.title: Build the High-Conversion UI
steps.description: Create a pricing table component that highlights the 'Professional' tier using visual cues to guide user choice.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a React pricing component with Tailwind CSS that emphasizes a 'Most Popular' tier through visual distinction.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create PricingTable.tsx with responsive tailwind design'

steps.title: Implement Conversion Triggers
steps.description: Add logic to your app that prompts users to upgrade when they approach their usage limit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a middleware function that checks user usage against their tier limits and triggers a CTA if they exceed 80% capacity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add subscription-gate.middleware.ts to the project'

steps.title: Deploy and Test Flows
steps.description: Use Claude Code to automate the testing of your payment lifecycle from checkout to tier access.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a test suite for the payment lifecycle including successful checkout and tier-based feature gating.

pro_tips: Always price your middle tier as the 'anchor'; make it 3x more valuable than the starter tier to drive conversions.
Use 'usage-based' pricing to lower the barrier to entry, allowing users to start for free and scale as they succeed.
Implement a 'hidden' annual discount toggle; it increases lifetime value (LTV) significantly without extra marketing.
Never display a 'Contact Us' button for your middle tier; keep the checkout flow frictionless and automated.
Show social proof—like user counts or client logos—directly inside your pricing table to build instant trust.
content.next_steps: Once your pricing is live, focus on building a 'free tool' or 'calculator' related to your niche to drive organic traffic to your pricing page.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical foundation to turn code into cash. By automating your pricing strategy, you remove the need for traditional marketing and let your product speak for itself. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
